title: Custom Agent — Generic Input Contract (v1)
description: Flexible input contract for user-defined custom subagents. No stage_id const — use any agent name. No strict validation — the agent defines its own expectations.

agent_name.description: Agent filename stem (matches the .md file in agents/)

context.description: Any context the custom agent needs. Passed through as-is.

artifacts.description: Paths to prior output artifacts the agent should read

model_override.description: Model to use. Falls back to tool default.
